assertionResults.title: penaltyRatio is strictly increasing across all 8 tiers

assertionResults.title: penaltyRatio increments by 1 per tier (linear)

assertionResults.title: penaltyRatio out of range throws

assertionResults.fullName: trust/calculateGain: monotonic + sign-correct gain is positive for valid inputs
assertionResults.title: gain is positive for valid inputs

assertionResults.fullName: trust/calculateGain: monotonic + sign-correct gain matches spec formula exactly at (currentScore=0, ceiling=MAX, READ)
assertionResults.title: gain matches spec formula exactly at (currentScore=0, ceiling=MAX, READ)

assertionResults.fullName: trust/calculateGain: monotonic + sign-correct gain decreases as currentScore approaches ceiling (headroom shrinks)
assertionResults.title: gain decreases as currentScore approaches ceiling (headroom shrinks)

assertionResults.fullName: trust/calculateGain: monotonic + sign-correct gain is zero when currentScore equals ceiling
assertionResults.title: gain is zero when currentScore equals ceiling

assertionResults.fullName: trust/calculateGain: monotonic + sign-correct higher risk action earns more (cube-root scaling)
assertionResults.title: higher risk action earns more (cube-root scaling)

assertionResults.fullName: trust/calculateLoss: negative + tier-amplified loss is negative for valid inputs
assertionResults.title: loss is negative for valid inputs

assertionResults.fullName: trust/calculateLoss: negative + tier-amplified higher tier => deeper loss (P(T) scales 3× → 10×)
assertionResults.title: higher tier => deeper loss (P(T) scales 3× → 10×)

assertionResults.fullName: trust/calculateLoss: negative + tier-amplified |loss| at T7 / |loss| at T0 = 10/3 (penalty-ratio shape)
assertionResults.title: |loss| at T7 / |loss| at T0 = 10/3 (penalty-ratio shape)

assertionResults.fullName: trust/calculateLoss: negative + tier-amplified loss matches spec formula exactly at (T3, MEDIUM, MAX ceiling)
assertionResults.title: loss matches spec formula exactly at (T3, MEDIUM, MAX ceiling)
